body:
<center>

# Home GUI

### Access your homes with just one click! 

[![Fabric API](https://img.shields.io/badge/Fabric%20API-Required-blue?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
[![Minecraft](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft-1.21.4-green?style=for-the-badge&logo=minecraft)](https://minecraft.net)
[![Client Side](https://img.shields.io/badge/Side-Client%20Only-orange?style=for-the-badge)](/)

</center>

---

## Description

**Home GUI** is a lightweight and sleek client mod that allows you to access all your homes through a **beautiful graphical interface**!

No need to type `/home base`, `/home mine`, `/home farm`... Simply press **H** and teleport with just one click! 

> **Compatible with all servers** using home plugins (EssentialsX, CMI, etc.)

---

## Features

<center>

| Feature | Description |
|:---:|:---|
| **Sleek GUI** | Modern interface with smooth animations |
| **Favorites** | Mark your favorite homes (right-click) |
| **Search** | Quickly find a home |
| **5 Themes** | Purple, Ocean, Forest, Sunset, Cherry |
| **Statistics** | Track your teleports |
| **History** | Quick access to recent homes |
| **Shortcuts** | Keys 1-9 for instant teleport |
| **Save** | Your preferences are saved |

</center>

---

## Installation

1. Install [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/use/installer/) for **1.21.4**
2. Install [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
3. Download **Home GUI** and place it in your `mods/` folder
4. Launch the game and press **H**! 

---

## Configuration

The mod automatically saves your preferences in:

----------------------------------
```
.minecraft\config\homegui.json
```
